identity.name: Pasta Privato
identity.address: St Lawrence (11 Church St, inside Notte)

narrative.summary: 30-seat pasta speakeasy hidden behind a door inside Notte Ristorante. Chef Angeloni (ex-Amano). 8-course tasting $125 or à la carte. Tajarin with Kaluga caviar. Opens March 27 — will have a waitlist before it has a Google listing.
